title: CHILD SEXUAL ABUSE PREVENTION - 211info
text: STOP IT NOW INC CHILD SEXUAL ABUSE PREVENTION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides support, information, and resources to individuals and families in order to keep children safe from sexual abuse. Offers a confidential helpline and online information and resources on subjects such as safe touching and relationships with adults, how to recognize child sex abuse, where to get help if an individual feels that they may sexually abuse a child, and information about healing and recovery from sexual abuse. Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday 9am-5pm, Tuesday/Wednesday/Friday 9am-3pm, Thursday 7am-3pm Email - (888) 773-8368 Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Toll-free (888) 773-8368 Helpline Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call, email, or visit website for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Nationwide Services: Child Abuse Prevention Sexual Assault Prevention Specialized Information and Referral * Child Abuse Issues Specialized Information and Referral * Sexual Assault Issues Other Services Offered At This Location: INFORMATION SERVICES - WHAT'S OK? If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
